name: @onderling/substrate-stack
description: Shared substrate-stack factory: composes @onderling/pseudo-pod + @onderling/pod-routing + @onderling/notify-envelope (+ optional @onderling/versioning) into one per-bundle stack. Consolidates the stoop/tasks-v0/household substrateStack.js triplets (invariant #3) and is the single composition seam where pod versioning gets injected (PLAN-pod-versioning-history-recovery P2).
